subcodes.first_line: The musk-laden message which you had written to your kind father was read, word for word
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه مشکین که بپدر مهربان مرقوم نموده بودید بنهایت روح و ریحان حرفا بحرف
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @predictions and prophecies, @business; financial; property matters, @call to action
